facts.label: LA MAREA ROJA
facts.story: Long before qualifying for a World Cup, Panama's national team earned the nickname 'La Marea Roja' — The Red Tide — for the deep red shirts worn since the country's earliest internationals. Building the 2018 kit, New Balance layered a tonal 'Red Pepper' chevron across the front, drawing on Panama City's skyline and the harpy eagle, the national bird, while stitching the anthem's line 'Alcanzamos por fin la victoria' inside the collar.

facts.label: THE GOAL THAT STOPPED PANAMA
facts.story: On 10 October 2017, with the United States losing in Trinidad, Panama needed a win over Costa Rica to reach a first-ever World Cup. In the 87th minute, defender Román Torres rose to head home the winner, Panama 2, Costa Rica 1. President Juan Carlos Varela declared the next day a national holiday; horns and fireworks filled Panama City through the night as Los Canaleros finally punched their ticket to Russia.

2018.headline: The Red Tide Debuts

annotations.label: PENEDO'S FIRST-HALF HEROICS
annotations.story: Jaime Penedo denied Yannick Carrasco and Dries Mertens early, and Panama somehow reached halftime scoreless against Belgium's golden generation. The dam broke after the break: Mertens' curling volley, then two from Romelu Lukaku, sealed a 3–0 defeat in Panama's first-ever World Cup match — heartbreak, but a fight nobody expected.

annotations.label: FIRST GOAL, ETERNAL MOMENT
annotations.story: Down 6–0 in Nizhny Novgorod after a Harry Kane hat-trick, 37-year-old Felipe Baloy rose to meet a Ricardo Ávila free-kick and hammer home Panama's first-ever World Cup goal in the 78th minute. The bench emptied and fans back home wept — a nation's first goal outweighed the scoreline that produced it.

annotations.label: OUT FIGHTING, NOT FADING
annotations.story: Already eliminated, Panama led for the first time at a World Cup when José Rodríguez's deflected shot beat Tunisia's keeper in the 33rd minute. Fakhreddine Ben Youssef and Wahbi Khazri answered in the second half, but Los Canaleros closed their historic debut having scored in back-to-back matches — pride intact.

2018.homeColors: red shirt with tonal 'Red Pepper' chevron pattern, red shorts and socks (New Balance)
2018.awayColors: white shirt with 'Pan Blue' chevron pattern and full stripe collar
